if.if: and ( cr.crName like concat('%', #{dto.qkey}, '%') or cl.cName like concat('%', #{dto.qkey}, '%') )

mapper.select: select count(*) as totalcount, count(distinct sc.scStudentId) as studentcount, round(avg(sc.scScore), 2) as avgscore, max(sc.scScore) as maxscore, min(sc.scScore) as minscore, round(sum(case when sc.scScore >= 60 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(*), 2) as passrate, round(sum(case when sc.scScore >= 90 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(*), 2) as excellentrate from scoreinfo sc left join classinfo cl on sc.scClassId = cl.cId left join majorinfo mj on cl.cMajorId = mj.mId left join courseinfo cr on sc.scCourseId = cr.crId

select cr.crId as crid, cr.crName as crname, cl.cId as cid, cl.cName as cname, count(*) as totalnum, round(avg(sc.scScore), 2) as avgscore, max(sc.scScore) as maxscore, min(sc.scScore) as minscore, round(sum(case when sc.scScore >= 60 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(*), 2) as passrate, round(sum(case when sc.scScore >= 90 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(*), 2) as excellentrate from scoreinfo sc left join classinfo cl on sc.scClassId = cl.cId left join majorinfo mj on cl.cMajorId = mj.mId left join courseinfo cr on sc.scCourseId = cr.crId
group by cr.crId, cr.crName, cl.cId, cl.cName order by avgscore desc, cr.crId asc, cl.cId asc
